_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Utilize technical documentation or resources to implement a new mathematical, data science, or computer science method.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including standard operating procedures, runbooks, escalation matrices, and knowledge base articles.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.545), AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.500).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.6/10 (raw 0.657). Shared vocabulary: [data, documentation]. DCWF-only terms [computer, implement, mathematical, method, new, resources] vs WIDAI-only terms [articles, base, develop, escalation, knowledge, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.876, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Utilize technical documentation or resources to implement a new mathematical, da" and "Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including stand" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.573 < STS 0.657 (gap -0.084). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [computer, implement, mathematical] and [articles, base, develop] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.7%. Shared tokens: [data, documentation]. DCWF-only: [computer, implement, mathematical, method, new, resources]. WIDAI-only: [articles, base, develop, escalation, knowledge, maintain].
